context: User shares a GitHub issue URL and explicitly asks to save it

checklist.name: Passes the correct GitHub URL
checklist.description: The command passes `https://github.com/oven-sh/bun/issues/1234` as the URL argument

checklist.name: Does not specify --tier
checklist.description: Does NOT add a `--tier` flag — vault-fetch sets tier automatically

checklist.name: URL is properly quoted
checklist.description: The URL argument is quoted to prevent shell interpretation issues

checklist.name: Command is syntactically correct
checklist.description: The full command would execute without syntax errors
